queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability and its association with lower credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how a negative checking account balance influences credit risk mitigation and reduces default likelihood in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Determinants of default: evaluating the correlation between financing a used vehicle and decreased credit risk exposure among borrowers.
